## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated, and they fail before the implementation change
- [ ] `pnpm test` and `pnpm typecheck` pass locally
- [ ] Behaviour-changing PRs include regenerated `fixtures/expected/*.md` snapshots
- [ ] No telemetry, analytics, or outbound network calls introduced in `core` or `web`
- [ ] No new dependency unless clearly justified in the PR description
- [ ] Linked the issue or spec section this addresses

## Linked issue / spec

Closes #
